summary: Iteration 52 - Tested 2 bug fixes in MembersPage edit modal: (1) Monthly renewal cycle calculation now correctly adds 1 month from signed_date (Adrienne: 2025-12-10 + 1 month = 2026-01-10). (2) Billing section fields (Montant, Méthode, Cycle, Jour du mois) are now EDITABLE, not disabled. All 7 test cases passed.
critical_code_review_comments: MembersPage.js line 893-906: Renewal cycle selector correctly uses addMonths(baseDate, cycle.months) without the old 'advance until future' loop
MembersPage.js line 974+: Billing section no longer has disabled attributes on fields
MembersPage.js line 989-995: Yellow info banner correctly displays when membership type is configured
dialog.jsx line 33: overflow-y-auto added to DialogContent for proper modal scrolling
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 52 verified 2 bug fixes in MembersPage edit modal: (1) Monthly renewal cycle now correctly calculates +1 month from contract_signed_date (tested with Adrienne Polli: 2025-12-10 + 1 month = 2026-01-10, and Annuel: +12 months = 2026-12-10). (2) Billing fields are now editable - removed disabled attribute. The modal scrolls properly with overflow-y-auto on DialogContent. Yellow info banner appears for members with configured membership types.

modal_scroll.details: Edit modal has overflow-y-auto on content div, billing section visible by scrolling

billing_fields_editable.details: Billing Amount, Cycle Value fields are NOT disabled - can edit values

renewal_cycle_mensuel.details: Selecting 'Mensuel (1 mois)' correctly sets expiration to contract_date + 1 month (2025-12-10 -> 2026-01-10)

renewal_cycle_annuel.details: Selecting 'Annuel (12 mois)' correctly sets expiration to contract_date + 12 months (2025-12-10 -> 2026-12-10)

manual_date_sets_custom.details: Manually editing expiration date changes renewal cycle to 'Personnalisé'

billing_toggle.details: Facturation récurrente toggle can be turned ON/OFF, fields show/hide accordingly

yellow_info_message.details: Yellow banner displays 'Valeurs par défaut du type... Modifiable ici pour ce membre uniquement' for members with configured membership type

test_member: Adrienne Polli (contract_signed_date: 2025-12-10, membership: HYBRID FULL - PAIEMENT MENSUEL)
